Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hello, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'd like to ask you a favor. Are you available tonight? I'll be waiting in front of the dorm.[n]{f 1 5 0}I know this is a difficult period, so thank you for your time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can we meet today? I'll explain everything when you come.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting on the fourth floor of the dorm. See you then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've been training even harder since last time. This time, I'm not going to lose, so let's go again.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be on the fourth floor of the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We'll be starting school again tomorrow, but in the end, I didn't do much over summer vacation. I wish I could do something fun today...[n]{f 4 1}-san, do you have any ideas?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you free tonight? I really need your help with something.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting in front of the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 1}-san, you're close with Koromaru, right? I wonder what he's doing outside the dorm entrance. Please ask him the next time you see him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I know you're a busy person, but do you have some time to spare?[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting on the fourth floor of the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I just need a bit of your time.[n]{f 1 5 0}I want to ask you another favor. You're the only person I can count on.[n]{f 1 5 0}I'll be waiting on the fourth floor of the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
